summary: Tested social login features: Google OAuth (Emergent-managed), Apple and Facebook 'coming soon' buttons. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All social login buttons present with correct styling and functionality.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/auth/google endpoint exists (returns 401 for invalid session_id)
Backend: /api/auth/google returns 422 for missing session_id parameter
Backend: Email/password login still works (200 OK with token)
Backend: Registration still works alongside social login
Backend: /auth/callback route exists (frontend SPA handles it)
UI: 'Continue with Google' button visible with data-testid='google-login-btn'
UI: 'Continue with Apple' button visible with data-testid='apple-login-btn'
UI: 'Continue with Facebook' button visible with data-testid='facebook-login-btn'
UI: Google button has correct white background with Google icon
UI: Apple button has correct black background with Apple icon
UI: Facebook button has correct blue (#1877F2) background with Facebook icon
UI: Apple button shows 'coming soon' toast notification
UI: Facebook button shows 'coming soon' toast notification
UI: Google button redirects to auth.emergentagent.com with correct redirect URL
UI: Email/password login redirects to home page on success
critical_code_review_comments: Auth.jsx correctly implements all three social login buttons with proper data-testid attributes
Google OAuth flow uses Emergent Auth (auth.emergentagent.com) correctly - no hardcoded URLs
Apple and Facebook handlers show appropriate 'coming soon' toast messages using sonner
AuthCallback.jsx properly handles OAuth callback with session_id extraction from URL hash
/api/auth/google endpoint correctly validates session_id against Emergent backend
setUserAndToken function added to AuthContext for OAuth login flow
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_social_auth_* user during registration test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social login features fully implemented: Google OAuth uses Emergent-managed auth (auth.emergentagent.com), Apple and Facebook show 'coming soon' toast notifications. All buttons have correct data-testid attributes. Email/password auth continues to work. The OAuth callback flow is handled at /auth/callback which extracts session_id from URL hash and exchanges it via /api/auth/google endpoint.
